pages.text: The Bottle of Lilith's Blood is a bottle that contains the precious blood of $(l:creatures/lilith)Lilith$(/l).$(br)When drunk by a $(l:observations/vampirism)Vampire$(/l) player it will increase it's Vampire level by one. If the Vampire is already at the maximum Vampire level, it will restore 8 droplets of blood.$(br)When drunk by a non-Vampire player it will turn them into one.
